title: Saudi Arabian Vegetable Pilaf with Truffle
description: A flavorful and aromatic pilaf dish inspired by the Middle Eastern cuisine, with the added luxury of truffle.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the onions and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the carrots and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Add the rice, chicken broth, truffle salt, and stir to combine.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 18-20 minutes.
Stir in the truffle oil and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and stir in the chopped parsley and flaked almonds.
Serve hot and garnish with additional truffle oil if desired.
